items.original_text: Our experiments show that UNIFIEDQA performs on par with 8 different models that were trained on individual datasets themselves.
UNIFIEDQA performs surprisingly well, showing strong generalization from its out-of-format training data.
Fine-tuning this pre-trained QA model into specialized models results in a new state of the art on 10 factoid and commonsense QA datasets.
We convert each of our target datasets into a text-in/text-out format. The question always comes first, followed by some additional information.
items.audit_note: claim声称'问题总是排在前面'，但原文还提到'followed by some additional information'，claim遗漏了后续信息可能包含答案候选的说明

items.original_text: BoolQ, SQuAD 2.0, OBQA, and NarQA contributed the most to performance.
UnifiedQA-v2 utilizes more supervision -- roughly 3x the number of datasets used for UnifiedQA. This generally leads to better in-domain and cross-domain results.
items.claim_text: [EV-006] UnifiedQA-v2 uses roughly 3x the number of datasets, leading to better in-domain and cross-domain results.

items.original_text: We present UnifiedQA-v2, a QA model built with the same process as UnifiedQA.
items.claim_text: [EV-007] UnifiedQA-v2 follows the same process as UnifiedQA with expanded supervision.

items.original_text: Macaw is built on UnifiedQA and extends the approach to multi-modal QA settings.
items.claim_text: [EV-008] Macaw is built on UnifiedQA, extending to multi-modal QA.

items.original_text: Despite the successes of pretrained language models, there are still few high-quality, general-purpose QA systems that are freely available.
items.claim_text: [EV-009] High-quality general-purpose QA systems remain scarce despite pretrained LM advances.

items.original_text: Question Generation aims at generating questions based on given answers and context. Existing QG methods mainly focus on specific QG formats.
items.claim_text: [EV-010] Existing QG methods mainly focus on specific QG formats.

items.original_text: Our work narrows our scope to tasks that stay within the boundaries of QA, demonstrating that a unified text-to-text paradigm can, in fact, be successful across different QA tasks and formats.
items.claim_text: [EV-011] 本工作的范围限定于QA任务内部，证明了统一text-to-text范式可成功跨越不同QA任务和格式。

items.original_text: Including out-of-format training data X=SQuAD2 boosts performance from 51% to as much as 59%. The gain may be less in other cases, but across all anchor and evaluation datasets, we generally observe that there is at least one out-of-format training set whose inclusion improves performance.
items.claim_text: [EV-012] 跨格式训练有益：BoolQ+NP-BoolQ场景下，加入SQuAD2数据后性能从51%提升至59%。

items.original_text: UNIFIEDQA performs almost as good as individual T5 models targeted to each dataset. In some cases UNIFIEDQA performs even better than the dedicated models.
items.claim_text: [EV-013] UNIFIEDQA与针对每个数据集单独训练的T5模型性能几乎持平，部分情况下甚至超越专用模型。

items.original_text: When averaged across all evaluation datasets (last column), UNIFIEDQA shows strong generalization performance across all formats. Notably, the "Previous best" models (last row) were trained on the target dataset's training data, but are even then outperformed by UnifiedQA (which has never seen these datasets during training) on the YN tasks.
items.claim_text: [EV-014] UNIFIEDQA在所有评估数据集上平均泛化性能强。特别是在YN任务上，即便previous best模型用了目标数据集训练数据，也被从未见过该数据集的UNIFIEDQA超越。

items.original_text: On average UNIFIEDQA clearly outperforms the ensemble of dataset/format-specific systems. UNIFIEDQA thus offers flexibility across multiple QA formats while compromising almost nothing compared to dataset-specific experts.
items.claim_text: [EV-015] 平均而言，UNIFIEDQA明显超越数据集/格式专用模型的集成，同时几乎不损失精度。

items.original_text: NarrativeQA (NQA) is the most helpful dataset and even helps multiple formats. Similarly our extractive datasets (SQuAD11.1, SQuAD 2, and NewsQA) are also relatively more helpful. While large datasets generally appear to help, RACE, another large-scale dataset, does not help that much. The least helpful dataset in the mix is BoolQ which focuses on yes/no questions.
items.claim_text: [EV-016] 数据集贡献度：NarQA贡献最大（跨格式帮助）；大语料集总体有帮助，但RACE帮助有限；BoolQ贡献最小。

items.original_text: We evaluate UNIFIEDQA on 20 existing datasets that target different formats as well as various complex linguistic phenomena.
items.claim_text: [EV-017] UNIFIEDQA在20个现有数据集上评估，覆盖不同格式和复杂语言现象。

items.original_text: For MC datasets without any context paragraph: question (A) c1 (B) c2 ... where c1,c2,... are the set of candidate answers. If the question includes a context paragraph, it is appended after the candidate answers.
items.claim_text: [EV-018] MC格式编码规则：无上下文时question (A) c1 (B) c2 ...；有上下文时追加在候选答案之后。

items.original_text: We use textual prefixes to explicitly define the task associated with each input instance. We narrow our focus to variations of QA. This allows us to achieve strong results while avoiding reliance on any format-specific prefixes.
items.claim_text: [EV-019] 关键设计差异：先前工作（如T5）使用文本前缀定义任务，本工作不使用格式特定前缀，模型自行从内容推断格式。

items.original_text: Fine-tuning of pre-trained language models has become the standard paradigm for building dataset-specific state-of-the-art systems. We ask: when it comes to QA, is there a value in using UNIFIEDQA as a starting point for fine-tuning, as opposed to a vanilla language model that has not seen other QA datasets before?
items.claim_text: [EV-020] 研究问题：相比未见过QA数据的vanilla LM，用UNIFIEDQA作为微调起点是否更有优势？
